description.ko: 속도감 있는 백색 에너지 파동이 속이 빈 유리 렌즈들을 지나 꽃잎 같은 무지개 카스틱으로 번지는 밝은 PRISM-2 굴절 장면.
description.en: A bright PRISM-2 refraction bloom where hollow glass lenses turn rapid white energy pulses into petal-shaped rainbow caustics.

prompt: PRISM-2 bright refraction bloom in a weightless white studio: an asymmetrical constellation of hollow, blown-glass teardrops surrounds a compact white energy core, each teardrop stretched like an optical lens and frozen at a different tilt. The core releases rapid strobing wavefronts instead of a single beam, and the curved glass shells fracture the pulses into petal-shaped rainbow caustics, zigzag dispersion paths, and crisp chromatic aberration halos. Emphasize #FF0080 magenta flare cuts, #00FF80 mint refraction veins, #8000FF violet rim glows, and #FFFF00 yellow focal sparks crossing through transparent glass. Low sparse particles only, high-key luminous atmosphere, polished optical clarity, fast spectral motion trails, sharp internal reflections, pure rainbow energy suspended without a floor, horizon, triangular prism, or dark surface.
